hero.description: Independently developed a One-Page Resume web application using React, Vite, and TypeScript, implementing a well-structured component-based architecture. Designed and organized the project following modern frontend engineering standards and managed version control with Git. Configured deployment through CI/CD workflow to ensure efficient updates.

projects.title: Experience
projects.desc1: Designed and developed a One-Page Resume web application using React, Vite, and TypeScript with structured component-based architecture.
projects.desc2: Implemented responsive UI and ensured cross-device compatibility.
projects.desc3: Managed source code with Git using branch-based workflow and best version control practices.
projects.desc4: Configured build optimization and deployed to production environment with CI/CD integration.
